Senator 2025-10-22 4:03 PM
Collaboration TLDR, -Collaborations should be discussed under Public Relations, Order goes as follows due to the Collaboration Manager Role -Isaac -Hytoko -Jedi Public Relations plays a key in the following -Establishing contact with these possible collaborators (Reaching out first) -Determining if they like the project or brand -Keeping them informed on possible internal situations Collaboration Managers do the following -Detailing the content of these collaborations -Handle all further discussions with these collaborators Discussions should have a majority agreement among more then 1-3 people actively, and should be cleared with the owners (Hytoko, Basil) of the game before proceeding (edited)

Okay. Well everyone I've been talking with said to pull or put Flowers in limbo until everything's resolved I still don't wanna be involved anymore for my own reasons... the whole situation is just not for me, it put me and my friends on danger in the past and sometimes recently and in general I haven't felt comfortable with Forsaken for a while, but that's me, with Flowers' case, I'd say you guys can keep him in the game, and this game's better off without me anyways as I've been holding you guys back and I'm sorry about that

Hytoko 2025-11-23 11:31 AM
It’s done in order to provide a safety net for both developers. Let’s take a couple hypotheticals here. say we were to lock Stan behind Robux after the signing of the contract, or the Isle team is to lock anything Forsaken related behind Robux. This is to prevent either party from being able to fully take advantage of the others work to profit

Sorry
11:31 AM

It’s done in order to provide a safety net for both developers.
